meta.chineseName: 美国国立综合癌症网络指南
meta.scope: 结肠癌、直肠癌、胃癌、成人癌痛的诊断、治疗及支持治疗
meta.notes: 本知识库为NCCN指南关键内容的官方翻译版本，保留英文术语以便对照

meta.title: 结肠癌指南 Colon Cancer Guidelines

screening.title: 筛查 Screening
recommendations: 一般风险人群：45岁起进行平均风险筛查 Average-risk screening beginning at age 45
高危人群：40岁起或比家族最早发病年龄提前10年开始筛查 Earlier screening for high-risk individuals
筛查方法：粪便免疫化学检测(FIT)、粪便DNA检测、CT结肠成像、结肠镜检查 FIT, stool DNA test, CT colonography, colonoscopy
结肠镜检查是金标准 Colonoscopy is the gold standard
有息肉史者：结肠镜监测间隔根据息肉类型决定 Surveillance colonoscopy based on polyp characteristics

pathology.title: 病理诊断 Pathology
keyPoints: 组织学确诊是金标准 Histologic confirmation is required
分子检测：KRAS/NRAS/BRAF突变检测必须进行 KRAS/NRAS/BRAF mutation testing required
微卫星不稳定性(MSI)或错配修复(MMR)检测必须进行 MSI/MMR testing required
免疫组化：MLH1, MSH2, MSH6, PMS2蛋白表达检测 MMR protein expression by IHC

imaging.title: 影像学检查 Imaging
recommendations: 胸腹盆CT：所有患者基线评估 Baseline CT chest/abdomen/pelvis for all patients
腹部/盆腔MRI：肝转移评估 Liver MRI for metastatic assessment
PET-CT：选择性用于疑似转移病例 Selective use for suspected metastases
肝脏特异性对比剂MRI：肝转移敏感性最高 Preferred for liver lesion characterization

staging.title: 分期 Staging (AJCC TNM)
systems: T1: 肿瘤侵犯黏膜下层 Submucosa invasion
T2: 肿瘤侵犯固有肌层 Muscularis propria invasion
T3: 肿瘤穿透固有肌层 Subserosa or non-serosalized pericolic tissues
T4a: 肿瘤穿透脏层腹膜 Visceral peritoneal invasion
T4b: 肿瘤直接侵犯邻近器官或结构 Direct invasion of adjacent organs/structures
N0: 无区域淋巴结转移 No regional lymph node metastasis
N1: 1-3个区域淋巴结转移 1-3 regional lymph node metastases
N2: 4个或以上区域淋巴结转移 ≥4 regional lymph node metastases
M0: 无远处转移 No distant metastasis
M1: 远处转移 Distant metastasis present

surgery.title: 外科治疗 Surgery
principles: 完整结肠系膜切除(Complete Mesocolic Excision, CME)是标准术式 CME is the standard technique
淋巴结清扫：至少12枚淋巴结以准确分期 Adequate lymphadenectomy (≥12 nodes) for staging
切缘要求：R0切除（镜下切缘阴性）R0 resection required
腹腔镜手术：满足肿瘤学原则时可采用 Laparoscopic approach when oncologically appropriate
急诊手术：梗阻或穿孔时需个体化处理 Emergency surgery individualized

adjuvant.title: 辅助化疗 Adjuvant Chemotherapy
indications: III期（任何T N1-N2）：必须辅助化疗 Stage III: Adjuvant chemo required
II期高危因素：考虑辅助化疗 Stage II high-risk: Consider adjuvant chemo
II期高危因素：T4、脉管/神经侵犯、淋巴结<12枚、梗阻/穿孔 Poor differentiation, T4, <12 nodes, LVI, obstruction/perforation

regimens.name: FOLFOX
regimens.notes: 首选方案之一 Preferred regimen

regimens.name: 5-FU/亚叶酸钙
regimens.notes: 老年或奥沙利铂不耐受患者 For elderly or oxaliplatin-intolerant

metastatic.title: 转移性疾病的化疗 Metastatic Disease Chemotherapy

regimens.name: FOLFOXIRI
regimens.fullName: 5-FU/亚叶酸钙/奥沙利铂/伊立替康
regimens.notes: 强效三药方案 Triple regimen for aggressive disease

regimens.name: FOLFOX/FOLFIRI ± Bevacizumab
regimens.fullName: 双药化疗联合贝伐单抗
regimens.notes: 标准一线方案 Standard first-line options

regimens.name: CAPEOX ± Bevacizumab
regimens.fullName: 卡培他滨/奥沙利铂联合贝伐单抗
regimens.notes: 口服方案替代 Oral alternative

drugs.indications: 转移性结直肠癌一线治疗 First-line for metastatic CRC

drugs.drug: 西妥昔单抗/帕尼单抗 Cetuximab/Panitumumab
drugs.indications: RAS野生型转移性结直肠癌 RAS wild-type mCRC only
BRAF V600E突变转移性结直肠癌 BRAF V600E mutant mCRC

drugs.drug: T-DXd (DS-8201) 或 曲妥珠单抗+帕妥珠单抗
drugs.indications: HER2扩增/过表达的转移性结直肠癌 HER2+ mCRC
KRAS G12C突变结直肠癌 KRAS G12C mutant CRC

immunotherapy.title: 免疫治疗 Immunotherapy
indications: dMMR/MSI-H转移性结直肠癌：PD-1抑制剂一线首选 dMMR/MSI-H mCRC: PD-1 inhibitor preferred first-line
帕博利珠单抗Pembrolizumab：用于MSI-H/dMMR肿瘤 Pembrolizumab for MSI-H/dMMR tumors
纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗Nivolumab+Ipilimumab：dMMR/MSI-H可选方案 Alternative for dMMR/MSI-H
pMMR/MSS结直肠癌：免疫联合化疗仍在探索中 pMMR/MSS CRC: IO combinations under investigation

followup.title: 随访 Monitoring
surveillance: I期：少随访 Limited surveillance for stage I
II-III期：前2年每3-6个月随访，此后逐渐延长 Stage II-III: q3-6mo for 2yr, then less frequent
转移性疾病治疗后：定期影像学评估 Treated mCRC: Regular imaging surveillance
CEA监测：前2年每3-6个月 CEA q3-6mo for 2 years
结肠镜检查：术后1年， then 每3-5年 Colonoscopy at 1yr, then q3-5yr

meta.title: 直肠癌指南 Rectal Cancer Guidelines

staging.title: 直肠癌分期检查 Rectal Cancer Staging Workup
requirements: 直肠MRI：必须，明确T分期、淋巴结状态、环周切缘(CRM) Mandatory: MRI for T, N, CRM assessment
高分辨率直肠MRI是标准检查 High-resolution endorectal MRI is standard
评估肿瘤距肛缘距离 Distance from anal verge required
评估肛门括约肌受累与否 Sphincter involvement assessment
新辅助治疗后再次MRI评估肿瘤退缩 Response assessment after neoadjuvant therapy

imaging.title: 影像学检查 Imaging
recommendations: 胸腹盆CT：远处转移评估 For distant metastatic assessment
直肠内超声(EUS)：早期T分期可选 Endorectal US for early T staging
PET-CT：选择性用于转移评估 Selective for metastatic workup

early.title: 早期(T1N0) Early Stage
options: T1Sm1（浅表黏膜下层）：经肛门切除 Transanal excision for T1Sm1
T1Sm2-Sm3或高危T1：根治性切除 Radical resection preferred for T1Sm2-3 or high-risk
高级别腺瘤：内镜下切除 Endoscopic resection for high-grade adenoma

locallyAdvanced.title: 局部晚期 Locally Advanced (T3-4 or N+)
principles: 新辅助放化疗是标准治疗 Neoadjuvant chemoradiation is standard
长程放化疗(LRC)或短程放疗(SCRT)均可 Long-course or short-course radiation options
总缓解(Clinical Complete Response, cCR)：可考虑等待观察策略 cCR: Consider watch-and-wait
新辅助治疗后需手术切除 Non-cCR: Surgery required

radiation.notes: 同步口服卡培他滨或静脉5-FU Capecitabine or IV 5-FU with RT
radiation.rest: 间隔5-12周手术 Wait 5-12 weeks before surgery

radiation.notes: 立即手术或新辅助化疗后再手术 Immediate surgery or neoadjuvant chemo then surgery
radiation.rest: 短程延迟手术间隔1-4周 Short course with delay: 1-4 weeks

surgery.title: 手术原则 Surgical Principles
principles: 全直肠系膜切除(TME)是金标准 Total Mesorectal Excision (TME) is gold standard
低位前切除(LAR)保肛 Low Anterior Resection for sphincter preservation
腹会阴联合切除(APR)用于无法保肛者 Abdominoperineal Resection when APR needed
侧方淋巴结清扫：选择性进行 Selective lateral lymph node dissection
腹腔镜/机器人手术可选 Laparoscopic/robotic approaches acceptable

neoadjuvant.title: 新辅助化疗 Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy
neoadjuvant.notes: 全程新辅助治疗(TNT)模式 Total Neoadjuvant Therapy (TNT)
regimens: FOLFOX/CAPOX诱导化疗后放化疗 Induction chemo then chemoradiation
放化疗后辅助化疗 Adjuvant chemo after chemoradiation
短程放疗+新辅助化疗 SCRT + neoadjuvant chemo

adjuvant.title: 辅助化疗 Adjuvant Chemotherapy
adjuvant.notes: 基于结肠癌化疗原则 Similar to colon cancer adjuvant principles

watchfulWaiting.title: 等待观察策略 Watch-and-Wait / Non-operative Management
criteria: 必须是cCR或近cCR cCR or near-cCR required
充分知情同意 Informed consent essential
严格随访计划 Rigorous surveillance protocol
患者依从性要高 High patient compliance needed
surveillance: 前2年每1-3个月直肠指诊+内镜/ MRI Q1-3mo DRE + endoscopy/MRI for 2yr
第3年每3-6个月 Q3-6mo in year 3

metastatic.title: 转移性直肠癌 Metastatic Rectal Cancer
principles: 治疗原则同转移性结肠癌 Principles same as metastatic colon cancer
直肠原发灶处理需个体化 Primary tumor management individualized
同步放化疗可用于直肠原发灶控制 Concurrent RT for primary tumor control

followup.title: 随访 Surveillance
recommendations: 前3年每3-6个月随访 Q3-6mo for first 3 years
CEA监测：前3年每3-6个月 CEA q3-6mo for 3 years
胸腹盆CT：前3年每年评估 CT chest/abdomen/pelvis annually for 3yr
直肠MRI：前2年定期评估 Rectal MRI q3-6mo for 2yr if watch-and-wait
肠镜检查：术后1年 then 每3-5年 Colonoscopy at 1yr then q3-5yr

meta.title: 胃癌指南 Gastric Cancer Guidelines

screening.title: 筛查 Screening
recommendations: 高危地区/家族史：胃镜筛查 Endoscopy for high-risk areas/family history
日本、韩国胃癌高发区建议定期筛查 Regular screening recommended in high-incidence regions
血清胃蛋白酶原检测可辅助筛查 PG testing as adjunct

diagnosis.title: 诊断 Diagnosis
requirements: 胃镜活检确诊 Histologic confirmation required
HER2检测必须进行 HER2 testing required
MSI/MMR检测建议进行 MSI/MMR testing recommended
PD-L1检测建议进行 PD-L1 testing recommended
EB病毒检测可选 EBV testing optional

surgery.title: 手术原则 Surgical Principles
principles: D2淋巴结清扫是标准 D2 lymphadenectomy is standard
全胃切除或远端胃切除取决于肿瘤位置 Total or distal gastrectomy based on tumor location
R0切除是目标 R0 resection is the goal

adjuvant.title: 辅助治疗 Adjuvant Therapy
options: S-1单药辅助化疗（东亚证据）S-1 adjuvant for East Asian patients
XELOX (CAPEOX) 辅助化疗 CAPEOX adjuvant
SOX (S-1/奥沙利铂) 辅助化疗 SOX adjuvant
新辅助化疗FLOT方案（西方标准）FLOT neoadjuvant (Western standard)

firstLine.title: 一线治疗 First-line
regimens: HER2阳性：曲妥珠单抗+化疗 Trastuzumab + chemo for HER2+
HER2阴性：化疗±免疫 PD-1 + chemo for HER2-
帕博利珠单抗+化疗：PD-L1 CPS≥5或MSI-H Pembrolizumab + chemo for PD-L1 CPS≥5 or MSI-H
纳武利尤单抗+化疗：PD-L1 CPS≥5 Nivolumab + chemo for PD-L1 CPS≥5

secondLine.title: 二线治疗 Second-line
options: 紫杉醇单药或多西他赛单药 Paclitaxel or docetaxel monotherapy
伊立替康单药 Irinotecan monotherapy
雷莫西尤单抗+紫杉醇 Ramucirumab + paclitaxel
T-DXd (DS-8201)：HER2阳性（IHC3+或IHC2+/FISH+） For HER2+ (IHC3+ or IHC2+/FISH+)

thirdLine.title: 三线及以后 Third-line and beyond
options: 瑞戈非尼Regorafenib：VEGFR抑制剂 Multi-kinase inhibitor
TAS-102 (Lonsurf)：氟尿嘧啶类前药 Nucleoside analog
帕博利珠单抗：MSI-H/dMMR或高TMB Pembrolizumab for MSI-H/dMMR or high TMB

meta.title: 成人癌痛指南 Cancer Pain Management in Adults

principles.title: 疼痛管理原则 Pain Management Principles
fundamentals: 疼痛是多维度的，需要综合评估 Pain is multidimensional; comprehensive assessment required
患者自评是金标准 Patient self-report is gold standard
疼痛应当被视为第五生命体征 Pain as 5th vital sign
改善生活质量是核心目标 Quality of life is the primary goal

assessment.title: 疼痛评估 Pain Assessment
tools: 数字评分量表(NRS) Numeric Rating Scale (NRS)
视觉模拟量表(VAS) Visual Analog Scale (VAS)
面部表情量表 FPS-R Faces Pain Scale-Revised
简明疼痛评估量表(BPI) Brief Pain Inventory
components: 疼痛部位 Location of pain
疼痛强度 Intensity of pain
疼痛性质 Quality (sharp, dull, burning)
发作时间和规律 Temporal pattern
加重/缓解因素 Aggravating/alleviating factors
对日常生活的影响 Impact on ADLs

who ladder.title: WHO癌痛三阶梯 WHO Analgesic Ladder
steps: 第一阶梯：非阿片类镇痛药（非甾体抗炎药、对乙酰氨基酚）Step 1: Non-opioid ± adjuvant
第二阶梯：弱阿片类药物（可待因、曲马多）± 非阿片类 ± 辅助药 Step 2: Weak opioid for moderate pain
第三阶梯：强阿片类药物（吗啡、羟考酮、芬太尼）± 非阿片类 ± 辅助药 Step 3: Strong opioid for severe pain
principles: 按时给药(By the clock)而非按需给药 Scheduled dosing, not PRN only
个体化剂量 Titrate to effect
注意细节 Pay attention to detail
口服给药首选 Oral route preferred
辅助药物可选用于神经病理性疼痛 Adjuvants for neuropathic pain

common.notes: 标准阿片类药物 Standard opioid
可用于中重度疼痛 For moderate-severe pain

common.drug: 芬太尼透皮贴剂 Fentanyl patch
common.notes: 适用于无法口服患者 For patients unable to take oral
复杂疼痛，需专业经验 Complex pain; specialist experience needed

breakthrough.title: 爆发痛处理 Breakthrough Pain
options: 按需追加快速起效阿片类药物 Rescue dose of rapid-onset opioid
爆发痛频率>3次/日考虑背景剂量调整 Consider basal opioid adjustment
考虑长效阿片类药物转换或剂量调整 Consider opioid rotation or dose increase

categories.type: 神经病理性疼痛 Neuropathic Pain
骨转移疼痛 Bone Metastasis Pain

nonPharmacologic.title: 非药物治疗 Non-pharmacologic Approaches
options: 认知行为治疗 Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
放松训练 Relaxation techniques
针灸 Acupuncture
经皮神经电刺激(TENS) Transcutaneous Electrical Nerve Stimulation
姑息性放疗 Palliative radiation therapy for localized pain
介入治疗（神经阻滞、鞘内镇痛）Interventional techniques

sideEffects.title: 阿片类药物副作用管理 Opioid Side Effect Management
management: 便秘：预防性使用泻药 Constipation: Prophylactic laxatives required
恶心呕吐：预防性使用止吐药 Nausea: Antiemetics may be needed initially
镇静/嗜睡：通常一过性 Sedation: Usually transient
呼吸抑制：监测，纳洛酮备用 Respiratory depression: Monitor, naloxone available
成瘾/依赖：风险评估，规范管理 Addiction: Risk assessment, careful management

citationGuide.title: NCCN指南引用规范 Citation Guide
rules: 中文回答中引用NCCN指南，使用中文翻译内容附英文原文 Citation with Chinese translation + English original
治疗方案引用格式：【NCCN指南2026】Treatment recommendation with NCCN Guidelines 2026 reference
检查/评估引用格式：【NCCN指南2026】Assessment/Test recommendation with NCCN Guidelines 2026 reference
当CSCO与NCCN推荐不一致时，以国内临床实践为准，NCCN作为国际参考 When CSCO and NCCN differ, prioritize Chinese clinical practice with NCCN as international reference

format.example: 【NCCN指南2026】根据NCCN Guidelines Version 2.2026，转移性结直肠癌一线推荐化疗±靶向治疗，具体方案根据RAS/BRAF状态和患者因素选择。
format.source: 来源：NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology. Colon Cancer. Version 2.2026.
